# Quizestro

> All-in-one platform for organizing pub quiz events: live scoring, teams, leagues, and a public quiz map.

Quizestro helps quiz organizers run pub quiz nights with real-time scoring, team management, recurring schedules, leagues and seasons, a centralized question bank, and a public map of upcoming quizzes. Available in English and Serbian.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Quizestro, features, and pricing.
- [Quiz Map](/map): Public interactive map of pub quizzes with schedules, cities, and next-date filters.
- [Terms of Service](/terms): Legal terms for using Quizestro.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How user data is handled.
- [Refund Policy](/refund): Subscription refund terms.

## Optional

- [Sign in](/login): Account sign-in for organizers.
- [Create account](/register): Register a new organizer account.
